arts.ttl: Portsmouth sent early Championship relegation challenge after late Sheffield Wednesday and Plymouth drama
arts.sum: The majority of Pompey’s Championship rivals were in action on Saturday with John Mousinho’s men hosting West Brom on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Every Championship manager's win percentage rate after latest round of games - including Portsmouth, Leeds, Sunderland and Sheffield Wednesday bosses
arts.sum: John Mousinho is currently on his longest run without a Pompey win.

arts.ttl: 'Just didn't look like himself. Carried a threat. Stunk the place out' - what was said after former Portsmouth and Norwich's winger's debut appearance for Hull
arts.sum: The reviews are in for Abu Kamara’s first game in a Hull City shirt.

arts.ttl: Latest Championship promotion odds: Portsmouth chances compared to Sheffield Wednesday, Preston North End & others
arts.sum: Who will be the three to step up to the Premier League at the end of the season?

arts.ttl: 'To be honest': Portsmouth boss John Mousinho makes Kusini Yengi confession ahead of West Brom game - after striker's red card for Socceroos
arts.sum: John Mousinho believes Pompey will reap the benefits from Kusini Yengi’s red card while on international duty with Australia.

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU remember the Liverpool team that secured a dramatic win over West Brom three years ago?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss' remarkably honest admission over his strongest team ahead of West Brom and Burnley
arts.sum: John Mousinho has admitted he’s still searching for his strongest Pompey starting XI.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth EA Sports FC 25 Ratings: Full squad confirmed including Bishop, Yengi, Pack, and Murphy
arts.sum: Pompey's player ratings for the latest EA Sports FC game have been published online ahead of its release later this month.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth vs West Brom predictions: Plucky Pompey can pick up a point
arts.sum: Portsmouth take on West Brom in the Championship at Fratton Park on Sunday and Daniel Childs expects a close contest with the points being shared.

arts.ttl: Ex-Portsmouth and Sheffield Wednesday man Mark Chamberlain: Liverpool star injured me on purpose in FA Cup semi-final - I have proof
arts.sum: Mark Chamberlain is adamant Ronnie Whelan was on a mission to injure him in the 1992 FA Cup semi-final - and claims a Liverpool player has confirmed it.
